# Design

Version: 0.1  
Status: active

## Domain Model

Describe the important domain concepts and rules touched by this work.

## Application Flow

Describe main execution flow and where coordination or failure handling matters.

## Interface Contract

Describe routes, commands, messages, payloads, errors, and other external
interfaces that matter to this packet.

## Data Model

Describe persistence, migration, retention, or compatibility concerns if any.

## UI / Platform Impact

Describe visible platform or shell impact if relevant.

## Observability

Describe logs, metrics, traces, or review artifacts needed to understand success or failure.

## Dependency Map

List internal or external dependencies that increase risk.

## Unknowns To Burn Down First

List the riskiest unanswered questions that should be resolved before broad implementation.

## Alternatives Considered

List serious alternatives and why they were not chosen.
